hero.title: The only app that listens to your engine
hero.subtitle: Intelligent car diagnostics powered by artificial intelligence. Scan the sounds, read the codes, understand your car.
hero.badgeText: AI engine audio scan available in beta

features.title: 12 innovations changing diagnostics
features.subtitle: AutoDiag EU combines artificial intelligence, sound analysis and your phone's sensors for a complete diagnostic.
features.audioScanDesc: Our AI listens to your engine and detects 11 types of faults by sound, with 91.3% accuracy.
features.cabinScanDesc: 7 classes of interior noises detected to identify comfort and safety issues.
features.visionAIDesc: Instant recognition of codes and parts from a photo. Point, snap, understand.
features.aiMechanicDesc: Ask your questions in plain English. Our AI answers based on your specific vehicle.
features.driveTestDesc: Accelerometer, gyroscope, GPS and your phone's microphone for diagnostics on the move.
features.rpmFFTDesc: Engine speed measurement through sound frequency analysis, without an OBD2 connection.
features.shockAbsorberDesc: Damping ratio analysis via bounce test using your phone's built-in sensors.
features.virtualDynoDesc: Real-time engine power estimation via resistive forces and acceleration data.
features.clutchSlipDesc: Slip detection by correlating audio RPM with GPS speed readings.
features.brakeDiscDesc: Frequency analysis of vibrations during braking to detect disc warping.
features.acousticPrintDesc: Your vehicle's unique sound signature to track its condition over time.
features.fleetScoreDesc: Weibull model to predict breakdowns and optimise fleet maintenance.

seo.homeDescription: AutoDiag EU — The only app that listens to your engine. OBD2 diagnostics, AI audio scan, 250 fault codes, 677 compatible vehicles.
seo.codesDescription: 250 OBD2 fault codes documented with causes, costs and advice. Search your fault code for free.
seo.compatibilityDescription: Check if your car is compatible with AutoDiag EU. 677 European vehicles tested.
seo.pricingDescription: Free plan or Premium at £42/year. 7-day free trial. Complete car diagnostics.

diagnosticExpress.title: Express Diagnostic —
diagnosticExpress.subtitle: Select a symptom to see the likely causes and estimated costs
diagnosticExpress.cta: For a precise diagnostic — download AutoDiag EU

innovations.subtitle: Exclusive technologies that no competitor offers
innovations.desc01: Our SVM detects 11 classes of faults by sound with 91.3% accuracy. Place your phone near the bonnet — we do the rest.
innovations.desc02: 7 classes of interior noises identified automatically: rattles, squeaks, whistles and more.
innovations.desc03: Photograph a code, a part or a warning light. Instant recognition and clear explanation.
innovations.desc04: Ask your questions in plain English. Personalised answers for your vehicle, not generic copy-paste.
innovations.desc05: Accelerometer, gyroscope, GPS and your phone's microphone. No OBD2 dongle needed for a first road diagnostic.
innovations.desc06: Engine speed estimation via frequency analysis: f = (RPM x N_cyl) / (2 x 60). Surprisingly accurate.
innovations.desc07: Damping ratio zeta test via accelerometer. Assess your shock absorbers whilst driving.
innovations.desc08: Estimate real power output: P = m.a.v + resistive forces. A rolling road in your pocket.
innovations.desc09: Audio RPM and GPS speed correlation. Detects slipping before the clutch gives out completely.
innovations.desc10: Frequency analysis during braking. Identifies the characteristic vibrations of a warped disc.
innovations.desc11: Kullback-Leibler distance: we compare your engine's sound to its healthy reference signature.
innovations.desc12: Weibull model to anticipate breakdowns. Ideal for professional fleet managers.

dtcDetail.compatibilityResult: Your {brand} {model} is compatible with AutoDiag EU. The {protocol} protocol supports reading code {code} and {pidsSupported} real-time PIDs.
dtcDetail.ctaTitle: For a precise diagnostic of your vehicle
dtcDetail.ctaDescription: Scan your car with AutoDiag EU — real-time fault code reading, AI audio scan and much more.
